name: anbima-data
description: ANBIMA data-feed skills (cadastral, historical, CRI/CRA secondary market). Each skill can call ANBIMA directly (api.anbima.com.br, OAuth client_credentials) or route through the internal Agnes API server as a proxy. Bundled Python scripts + shared httpx client with token caching. Env vars: ANBIMA_CLIENT_ID, ANBIMA_CLIENT_SECRET, AGNES_BASE_URL, AGNES_API_KEY.
